name: gist-rocket
title: Gist Rocket
description: Publish HTML or Markdown as a live web page in one keystroke. Powered by GitHub Gists.
author: tgrecojs

commands.name: publish-page
commands.title: Publish Page
commands.description: Publish the HTML or Markdown on your clipboard as a live web page.

commands.name: publish-from-file
commands.title: Publish from File
commands.description: Pick an .html / .md file (or a folder with index.html) and publish it as a live web page.

commands.name: my-pages
commands.title: My Pages
commands.description: Browse, open, update, and delete pages you've published.

preferences.name: hostBaseUrl
preferences.title: Host Base URL
preferences.description: Where published pages are served. Leave default to use the public Gisthost service.

preferences.name: defaultVisibility
preferences.title: Default Visibility
preferences.description: New pages default to this visibility. Both public and secret render the same; secret is unlisted but not encrypted.

preferences.name: defaultMarkdownTheme
preferences.title: Default Markdown Theme
preferences.description: Theme applied when rendering Markdown to HTML.

preferences.name: autoOpenAfterPublish
preferences.title: After Publish
preferences.label: Open the hosted URL in your browser
preferences.description: Automatically open the published page in your browser after publishing.

preferences.name: copyUrlAfterPublish
preferences.title: After Publish
preferences.label: Copy the hosted URL to your clipboard
preferences.description: Automatically copy the published page URL to your clipboard after publishing.
